placement.ready_above.head.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement headline card (top of page 1). Short, warm, confident title (2-5 words). Names no internal program level.

placement.ready_above.body.en: Your child performs with confidence across current-level material and into more advanced work. They are ready to move up to the next stage.
placement.ready_above.body.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement narrative under the headline (1-2 sentences). Parent-facing; refers to 'level' / 'stage' generically, never an internal band name.

placement.on_track.head.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement headline card (top of page 1). Short, warm, confident title (2-5 words). Names no internal program level.

placement.on_track.body.en: Your child meets the current level securely. The foundations are solid; the next phase consolidates and extends them.
placement.on_track.body.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement narrative under the headline (1-2 sentences). Parent-facing; refers to 'level' / 'stage' generically, never an internal band name.

placement.consolidate_current.head.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement headline card (top of page 1). Short, warm, confident title (2-5 words). Names no internal program level.

placement.consolidate_current.body.en: Your child is working within the current level and benefits from consolidating a few core foundations before advancing. A focused start will close the gap.
placement.consolidate_current.body.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement narrative under the headline (1-2 sentences). Parent-facing; supportive, not deficit-framed; refers to 'level' / 'stage' generically.

placement.consolidate_prior.head.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement headline card (top of page 1). Short, warm, confident title (2-5 words). Names no internal program level.

placement.consolidate_prior.body.en: Your child will progress fastest by first strengthening foundations from the preceding stage. We recommend beginning there to build durable confidence.
placement.consolidate_prior.body.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement narrative under the headline (1-2 sentences). Parent-facing; supportive, forward-looking; refers to 'preceding stage' generically, never an internal band name.

placement.diagnose_prior.head.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement headline card (top of page 1). Short, professional title (2-6 words). Names no internal program level.

placement.diagnose_prior.body.en: We recommend a short foundational diagnostic at the preceding stage so we can place your child precisely and build from a secure starting point.
placement.diagnose_prior.body.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — placement narrative under the headline (1-2 sentences). Parent-facing; reassuring, not deficit-framed; refers to 'preceding stage' generically.

strand.reading.comprehension.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Reading & Language strand name (table heading, page 2). Concise.

strand.reading.comprehension.desc.en: Literal + inferential understanding, theme, and textual evidence.
strand.reading.comprehension.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Reading & Language strand name.

strand.reading.vocabulary.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Reading & Language strand name (table heading, page 2). Concise.

strand.reading.vocabulary.desc.en: Word meaning, roots/etymology, and precision in context.
strand.reading.vocabulary.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures'. 'etymology' / 'roots' per glossary (MCT linguistic concepts).

strand.reading.grammar.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Reading & Language strand name (table heading, page 2). Concise.

strand.reading.grammar.desc.en: Parts of speech, sentence analysis, and grammatical control.
strand.reading.grammar.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures'. MCT grammar concepts per glossary.

strand.reading.readingFluency.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Reading & Language strand name (table heading, page 2). Concise.

strand.reading.readingFluency.desc.en: Pace, phrasing, and rhythm in reading aloud.
strand.reading.readingFluency.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the strand name.

strand.reading.creative.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Reading & Language strand name (table heading, page 2). Concise.

strand.reading.creative.desc.en: Sound devices, figurative language, and authorial craft.
strand.reading.creative.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures'. Poetics terms (metaphor, alliteration, etc.) per glossary.

strand.reading.organization.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Reading & Language strand name (table heading, page 2). Concise.

strand.reading.organization.desc.en: Paragraph and argument structure on the quiz items.
strand.reading.organization.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the strand name.

strand.writing.essay_structure.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.writing.essay_structure.desc.en: Thesis, topic sentences, evidence + analysis, synthesizing conclusion.
strand.writing.essay_structure.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Writing skill name.

strand.writing.ideas.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.writing.ideas.desc.en: Originality, depth, and genuine engagement with the prompt.
strand.writing.ideas.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Writing skill name.

strand.writing.style.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.writing.style.desc.en: Voice, sentence variety, word choice, rhetorical control.
strand.writing.style.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Writing skill name.

strand.writing.grammar.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.writing.grammar.desc.en: Agreement, tense, pronoun reference, parallel structure.
strand.writing.grammar.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Writing skill name.

strand.writing.punctuation.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.writing.punctuation.desc.en: Commas, semicolons, colons, dashes, apostrophes, quotation marks.
strand.writing.punctuation.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Writing skill name.

strand.writing.usage.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.writing.usage.desc.en: Vocabulary precision, idiom, register, word-form accuracy.
strand.writing.usage.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Writing skill name.

strand.writing.mla_format.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Writing (AW3A) skill name (table heading, page 3). Keep 'MLA' in English.

strand.writing.mla_format.desc.en: Heading block, in-text citations, works cited, MLA conventions.
strand.writing.mla_format.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures'. Keep 'MLA' in English.

strand.oral.listening.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Oral & Listening strand name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.oral.listening.desc.en: Following a spoken passage; retell, inference, and detail.
strand.oral.listening.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Oral & Listening strand name.

strand.oral.speaking.label.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — Oral & Listening strand name (table heading, page 3). Concise.

strand.oral.speaking.desc.en: Read-aloud, open response, and spoken vocabulary.
strand.oral.speaking.desc.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — one-line 'what this measures' under the Oral & Listening strand name.

rating_note.0.en: This area was not assessed in this session.
rating_note.0.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — note auto-filled when a strand is scored 0/5 (Did Not Test). Applies across all strands; the Navigator may edit per child.

rating_note.1.en: Beginning — foundational skills are still forming; this is the Navigator's first focus.
rating_note.1.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — note auto-filled when a strand is scored 1/5 (Beginning). Supportive, not deficit-framed. 'Navigator' per glossary.

rating_note.2.en: Developing — the building blocks are emerging and growing more consistent.
rating_note.2.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — note auto-filled when a strand is scored 2/5 (Developing). Applies across all strands; the Navigator may edit.

rating_note.3.en: Approaching — solid working command, with the next layer of nuance in view.
rating_note.3.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — note auto-filled when a strand is scored 3/5 (Approaching). Applies across all strands; the Navigator may edit.

rating_note.4.en: Proficient — reliable, consistent control with only minor lapses.
rating_note.4.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — note auto-filled when a strand is scored 4/5 (Proficient). Applies across all strands; the Navigator may edit.

rating_note.5.en: Advanced — confident mastery, applied flexibly across new material.
rating_note.5.context: DODO ELA parent-facing assessment report — note auto-filled when a strand is scored 5/5 (Advanced). Applies across all strands; the Navigator may edit.
